title: DarkRooms
description: Brings back the old dark room mechanic for farming flowers easily!
body:
This mod brings back the old dark room mechanics that was primarily used to generate EMC, it does this by making it that when grass is bonemealed, if the light level is 0, it drops the grass / flowers instead of planting them.

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via  Patreon.
